Detailed Description

Defines the rewrite operation.

Definition in file rewrite.hpp.

Define Documentation

#define F (  z,
n,
_   ) 
 

Value:

template<typename Enum>                                  \
        void operator()(                                         \
            Node & node, Enum tag, size_t id                     \
            BOOST_PP_ENUM_TRAILING_PARAMS(n,NodePtr const & arg) \
          ) const                                                \
        {                                                        \
          node.destroy_payload();                                \
          new(node._payload()) payloads::InPlace<n>(             \
              BOOST_PP_ENUM_PARAMS(n,arg)                        \
            );                                                   \
          node.m_arity = n;                                      \
          assert((int)tag >= (int)CTOR);                         \
          node.m_tag = make_ctor_tag(tag);                       \
          node.m_id  = id;                                       \
        }                                                        \

Definition at line 63 of file rewrite.hpp.

#define F (  z,
n,
_   ) 
 

Value:

void operator()(                                         \
            Node & node, size_t id                               \
            BOOST_PP_ENUM_TRAILING_PARAMS(n,NodePtr const & arg) \
          ) const                                                \
        {                                                        \
          node.destroy_payload();                                \
          new(node._payload()) payloads::InPlace<n>(             \
              BOOST_PP_ENUM_PARAMS(n,arg)                        \
            );                                                   \
          node.m_arity = n;                                      \
          node.m_id = id;                                        \
          node.m_tag = OPER;                                     \
        }                                                        \
